//: tsx reads `paths` from this tsconfig (via TSX_TSCONFIG_PATH in the bench npm script) so the bench CLI resolves the bare `air-ts` specifier (used by prompts.ts) to air-ts SOURCE -- exactly as the Vitest alias does. Workspaces refactor (issue #85): the fast-xml-parser sub-alias is gone -- with npm workspaces the hoisted copy is discovered by ordinary resolution. The air-ts source alias is kept so the bench CLI runs without a `npm --workspace air-ts run build` first (dev-loop friendliness).
